description: Config axis sweep: vary (harness, model, thinking) while holding task fixtures constant.
note_on_placeholders: task_id, visible_tests_sha256, hidden_verifier_sha256, and materialized_repo_sha256 are PLACEHOLDER values to be replaced with content-addressed hashes from #1419 fixtures before any run. The runner aborts if any hash field begins with 'PLACEHOLDER_'.

configs.label: baseline
configs.notes: Default agentic baseline. Anchor row for delta_vs_baseline comparisons.

configs.label: baseline+thinking
configs.notes: Same model as baseline with extended thinking enabled at medium effort. reasoning_type=effort qualifies this cell for thinking.

configs.label: stronger
configs.notes: Top-ranked model by DeepSWE solve-rate. DeepSWE score reflects different harness; see deepswe_rank_caveat in run records.

configs.label: stronger+thinking
configs.notes: Top-ranked model with thinking enabled. Highest expected capability; highest expected cost.

configs.label: latest
configs.notes: Most recent model (static-prefix rank = arena ELO proxy 1575). No DeepSWE solve-rate yet available; model_rank_score reflects arena ELO fallback.

configs.label: latest+thinking
configs.notes: Most recent model with thinking enabled. reasoning_type=effort qualifies.

deepswe_caveat: Model cells where model_rank_source='deepswe-solve-rate' reflect solve-rate scores measured under the DeepSWE harness, not the PDD agentic CLI harness. These scores inform model-strength ordering but do not translate directly to PDD pass-rate predictions. Always reported with deepswe_rank_caveat in run records.
